name: Alex Chen
jobsToBeDone: Organize team workflows without learning a complex tool
Find reliable patterns for async collaboration

thinkingStyle.cognitiveSpace: Pragmatic efficiency-seeker who mentally maps new tools to existing workflows
emotionalReactions: Frustrated by tools that require extensive onboarding
Energized when a solution clicks immediately
guidingPrinciples: Do the simplest thing that works
If I can't explain it to my team in 2 minutes, it's too complex
